headline: Is The Procter & Gamble Company (PG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PG a good stock to buy now? We came across a bullish thesis on The Procter & Gamble Company on Phaetrix Investing’s Substack by Phaetrix. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PG. The Procter & Gamble Company’s share was trading at $155.22 as of March 9th. PG’s trailing and forward P/E were 22.76 […]

headline: Zefiro Methane Corp. Provides Update on Recent Strategic Execution and Milestones Achieved
summary: Shareholders of Zefiro are reminded that the deadline for submitting proxy votes is 12:00 p.m. (Eastern time) on Wednesday, March 18, 2026 in advance of the Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders taking place at 12:00 p.m. (Eastern time) on Friday, March 20, 2026 in Toronto. Please refer to Zefiro's February 24, 2026 Press Release for more information.Fort Lauderdale, Florida--(Newsfile Corp. - March 16, 2026) - ZEFIRO METHANE CORP. headline: Procter & Gamble’s US$1b Gillette Bet And What It Means For PG
summary: Procter & Gamble, ticker NYSE:PG, is committing nearly $1b to build a new flagship Gillette headquarters and technical center in Boston. The long term project will combine research, engineering, manufacturing support, and business operations on a single campus. The move concentrates Gillette’s talent and facilities in a major U.S. consumer and healthcare hub. For investors watching NYSE:PG, this announcement comes at a time when the stock trades around $150.65 and shows mixed recent...
